title: elymus plurinervis
intro: Elymus plurinervis, also known as the many-veined wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Elymus plurinervis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Elymus plurinervis can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
